name: Jason Yates
subject: Virginia needs your prayers!
body:
| | Peter, On Tuesday, you have important elections taking place across your state! Voting provides a tremendous opportunity to bring the values of our faith into our communities. But only 25 percent of the church usually turns out to vote - which means millions of Christians will likely stay home in Virginia. That’s why we’re asking you to pray for a Christian - by name - in your zip code, that they would vote for biblical values on Tuesday. We’ve partnered with _Intercessors for America_ to pray for Christians who typically do not vote in Virginia. Pray that God would lead them to take action and cast their vote to stand for God’s truth and biblical values. Will you take a couple of minutes to [view the prayer map and select someone to pray for](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=BOom2RdfI6ug6DAjcIV3nBpMStLIq2P1zXpHvqr-hTbnVuVixTaEvEZjtCrpqypz&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031comva&n=1)? Thank you for voting. I hope I can count on you to pray. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=BOom2RdfI6ug6DAjcIV3nBpMStLIq2P1zXpHvqr-hTbnVuVixTaEvEZjtCrpqypz&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031comva&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031comva&n=3) P.S. Are you ready to vote? View a full sample ballot for Virginia at [https://MyFaithVotes.org/voting-assistance/state/VA](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191031comva&n=4)
---

name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: Today marks 10 weeks since we launched this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Today marks 10 weeks since we launched this campaign. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783ea/307337327/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

Ten weeks ago, John launched this campaign for U.S. Senate. And I couldn't be happier about that decision, or more grateful for the outpouring of support we've seen.

**As we face tonight's October fundraising deadline, that support is even more necessary.** [**_Chip in to help us stay on track to bring Cory Gardner home in 2020._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191031_RH_20191031-fr-RH-EOMfinal-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

These days, it's clearer than ever: Colorado--and our country--can't afford Gardner in the U.S. Senate. He's voted to dismantle critical climate protections, benefitted from millions from the NRA and blocked common-sense gun reform, and voted to repeal protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions. Now, he's toeing the line for this corrupt White House and questioning the validity of the impeachment investigation.

**Cory Gardner 's a yes-man for the Trump/McConnell agenda, pure and simple**--so much so that Donald Trump is fundraising for Gardner next week, and Mitch McConnell and national Republicans have put this seat at the top of their priorities in 2020.

Watching all this drives home how important it is to win next year. Next year, we can replace Gardner with a leader who's fought time and again for our priorities--but only if we work together.

[**_Before tonight 's fundraising deadline, chip in and help us raise the resources to fight back against Gardner and his allies._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191031_RH_20191031-fr-RH-EOMfinal-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Robin [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191031_RH_20191031-fr-RH-EOMfinal-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e6/307337327/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e7/307337327/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e4/307337327/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e5/307337327/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e2/307337327/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e3/307337327/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146b/691c9bd/6fe5cb1a/11a783e6/307337327/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
clean_body: Today marks 10 weeks since we launched this campaign. | | | "" | Team, Ten weeks ago, John launched this campaign for U.S. Senate. And I couldn't be happier about that decision, or more grateful for the outpouring of support we've seen. As we face tonight's October fundraising deadline, that support is even more necessary. "=" These days, it's clearer than ever: Colorado--and our country--can't afford Gardner in the U.S. Senate. He's voted to dismantle critical climate protections, benefitted from millions from the NRA and blocked common-sense gun reform, and voted to repeal protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions. Now, he's toeing the line for this corrupt White House and questioning the validity of the impeachment investigation. Cory Gardner 's a yes-man for the Trump/McConnell agenda, pure and simple--so much so that Donald Trump is fundraising for Gardner next week, and Mitch McConnell and national Republicans have put this seat at the top of their priorities in 2020. Watching all this drives home how important it is to win next year. Next year, we can replace Gardner with a leader who's fought time and again for our priorities--but only if we work together. "=" Thank you, Robin "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: why I'm running to challenge the most vulnerable Republican in the Senate and flip Colorado blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- I'm John Hickenlooper, a Colorado Democrat running to flip the most vulnerable Republican-held seat in the country blue.
If you've been following Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, you know that Democrats face a tough fight to take back the Senate. Winning here in Colorado could make the difference between flipping the Senate, protecting health care and combating climate change -- or giving Mitch McConnell a blank slate for his far-right agenda.
**As Colorado's former governor, I know I can win here -- but with the stakes so high, Maggie thought I should reach out and ask for your help today.**
[**The strength of this campaign -- and Democrats' path to flipping the Senate blue -- will be built by grassroots supporters like you, friends. Can I count on you to give $3 right now to win in Colorado, take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court? I know this is one of the most consequential challenges for Democrats in 2020.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d4/2a380d31/3d4b9c97/f0eda4/3244008844/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEwMzFfTVdINEhpY2tfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191031_MWH4Hick_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
I'm ready to put Colorado and the country on a better path forward. But I'm facing down millions of dollars that McConnell and special interests will pour into my state to prop up their handpicked rubber stamp and keep an obstructionist stranglehold on the Senate.
And with just hours left until we close the books on October, my campaign is falling short of where we need to be. So, everyone, if you're all in to stop Mitch McConnell from standing in the way of progress on the issues that matter most to both of us, will you make a gift to my campaign? [**You can click here to help take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d4/2a380d31/3d4b9c97/f0eda4/3244008844/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEwMzFfTVdINEhpY2tfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191031_MWH4Hick_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
I know we can win in Colorado and flip the Senate -- but not without the support of grassroots Democrats like you. This is our best shot, and I thank you for helping us bring this home.
John Hickenlooper
U.S. Senate candidate, Colorado
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3d4/2a380d31/3d4b9c97/f0eda4/3244008844/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEwMzFfTVdINEhpY2tfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191031_MWH4Hick_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: TAKE ACTION: Help us keep Georgia voters on the rolls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
We're holding phone banks and text banks across the state to notify voters and help them stay on the rolls. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a7/3392332474/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - This week, Fair Fight Action learned that Georgia's Secretary of State is set to purge over 300,000 registered voters from the voting rolls across the state. **On November 21, just one day after the Democratic Presidential Debate in Atlanta, we will hold virtual phone banks and text banks across the state and a phone bank in the Atlanta area to notify voters and help them stay on the rolls.** [**Help us contact as many voters as possible by signing up here.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a4/3392332474/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScMgi5_BVggKVLunG0MwT0kEDAUh44KABtC9shyDT3-FDpEJw/viewform") Let's be clear - voters should not lose their right to vote simply because they have decided not to express that right in recent elections. And anytime a voter purge is conducted, errors can be made. After a long history of voter suppression, Fair Fight Action is spending resources to ensure voters have the information they need to stay registered and are able to vote. Fair Fight Action is tracking and analyzing Secretary of State purge data, and we're currently engaged in major litigation in federal court that includes the very constitutionality of "use it or lose it" purges. [**We need your help to get the word out. **](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a4/3392332474/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScMgi5_BVggKVLunG0MwT0kEDAUh44KABtC9shyDT3-FDpEJw/viewform") **We encourage anyone who receives a postcard to return it right away, and we encourage all voters to periodically check their registration status at[mvp.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a5/3392332474/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do"). ** **Any Georgian with questions about voting should call the Democratic Party of Georgia 's voter protection hotline at 1-888-730-5816.** With your help, we can continue to combat voter suppression across Georgia. In Solidarity,
Team Fair Fight Action
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a2/3392332474/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a3/3392332474/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a0/3392332474/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

1270 Caroline Street
Suite D120-430
Atlanta, GA 30307

(C)2019 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved

Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible.
[Unsubscribe](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa54e/34a064cc/1b3ef25f/70377a1/3392332474/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/unsubscribe")

body:

#
**We only have a few hours left until our first major fundraising deadline of this quarter. **We’re getting close, but we’re still falling short of our goal.

Peter, I wouldn’t be following up again if this wasn’t absolutely crucial. [**I’m personally asking each of my supporters to chip in now.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=83feaf803f&e=02cd889ad3) Ahead of next month’s Democrat debate – hosted by MSNBC – in Georgia, we need to make as strong of a showing as possible.

**The Senate majority, the White House, and the future of our Republic are all at stake in this election. This is no time for complacency. **

[**Please, pitch in whatever you can afford now. No amount is too small. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=57c8784753&e=02cd889ad3)

David Perdue
Sent from my iPhone

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44c8/4bd7760e/44bfd288/77ad8895/4064788690/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191031_ICYMIHardWork_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191031_ICYMIHardWork_U2_X1")

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: Are you with us?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
As we wrap up this month, I’m thinking about everything we’ve accomplished
this October. I’m so proud of our team, and how fearless you all have been
in fighting for our values and for the future we want for this country.

But there’s one last favor I want to ask of you before October ends: we’re
$30,000 short from reaching our end-of-month goal. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41828?refcode=ema20191031-64819&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=64819%2E444211%2E0Vs7IK ]This might seem like
a lot, but there’s a lot of you. If everyone chips in even just $4.00 I
know we can do it, please spare anything you can now.

Together, we’ve made major strides in helping Beto confront Trump’s petty
fear and hatred, advocate for a plan that will address the opioid crisis &
war on drugs in our country, call for transformative justice, challenge
this idea that we can’t be bold and courageous in our politics, and push
forward in the fight for meaningful, effective gun reform.

But to be honest with you, this month also brought a wave of new
challenges. Because our campaign isn’t afraid to take on the big fights or
say what we really believe –– Beto has become the top target of the
Republican party. Groups like the NRA have made our campaign the top
target of attack ads and disinformation campaigns –– making it difficult
for us to get the polls we need to qualify for the November debate.

We’re determined to fight back and keep pushing forward in this race, but
all of this depends on whether we have the resources to do it. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41828?refcode=ema20191031-64819&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=64819%2E444211%2E0Vs7IK ]We can’t
do this without you: will
you please chip in $4.00 and help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal
tonight?

Let’s do this together.

Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41828?refcode=ema20191031-64819&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=64819%2E444211%2E0Vs7IK ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191031footer&t=1004&refcode2=64819_444211_0Vs7IK&akid=64819%2E444211%2E0Vs7IK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=64819%2E444211%2E0Vs7IK

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Karen Giorno, Laura Loomer for Congress
subject: Midnight tonight
body:
I’m hoping the knocks and rings to your door bell have subsided a bit as trick-or-treaters dissipate on this school night.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701261-7d3fd4200d-7cf73d97cc)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701259-69b1070128-7cf73d97cc) I’m hoping the knocks and rings to your door have subsided a bit as trick-or-treaters dissipate on this school night.

My name is Karen Giorno and I’m serving as Laura Loomer’s Senior Advisor and Chief Strategist as she runs for Congress.

I’m looking at the campaign books and we are so close to hitting a major milestone that [**I’m asking for your late-night support before we close October**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701259-69b1070128-7cf73d97cc).

As a political veteran, I’ve worked for two Republican White Houses and five presidential campaigns, most recently running the Florida operations and National Voter Engagement for President Trump in 2016, from Trump Tower.

Being part of the historic, winning presidential election in 2016 was the highlight of my career. However, 2018 changed everything when the House was flipped from Red to Blue. As I’m confident that the President will win reelection, we need to concentrate on winning back the House.

For me, that starts in my home district, which is also the home of the Winter White House. The only candidate capable of flipping this important seat is Laura Loomer.

Having worked for a high-energy candidate like President Trump, I know what it’s going to take to win this District. And it will require a candidate to not only match the President’s energy level, but someone who is also unafraid to take on the Fake News Media, do-nothing Democrats and radical leftists . . . and that candidate is Laura Loomer.

That’s why [I’m asking you for your continued support](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701259-69b1070128-7cf73d97cc).

While I cannot disclose the details just yet, there’s a “magic number” that a campaign needs to hit, that opens doors at the highest levels. And **we’re just a few thousand dollars away from hitting that goal!**

[**If you can donate $10, $25, $100 or right now**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701259-69b1070128-7cf73d97cc), I’ll be able to close out October with a huge win for the campaign that will get Laura to that “verified contender” status that she needs in order to open friendly doors in Washington.

If you haven’t already done so recently, [**please donate as soon as you can**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701259-69b1070128-7cf73d97cc).

Thank you so much for supporting Laura. You have my sincere thanks.

With Respect,

Karen R. Giorno
Senior Advisor and Chief Strategist
Laura Loomer for Congress, Inc.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-4701260-32bedcce73-7cf73d97cc)
Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-352189-819300-84585d41bbe610b-7cf73d97cc)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Friend, I need your help before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The more attention this race gets, the more critical it is for us to meet our goals. We're nearly there -- only $1,457 left before midnight tonight. Can you pitch in?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191031eom5-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

Trump's campaign is planning to pour tens of millions of dollars into Minnesota, because he will do everything he can to try to win here. That includes publicly endorsing my opponent at his rally this month.

With Republicans coming together and pouring their resources into this state, we need to take this end-of-month benchmark as an opportunity to get ahead.

But I need to be honest with you: With just a few hours left before our end-of-month deadline, we haven't reached our goal yet.

Every grassroots donation shows that we're unafraid of the Republicans' threats. **We're nearly there -- we have just $1,457 left to raise. Will you help meet our goal?**

**[Before midnight, rush $10 or whatever you can to help me meet our end-of-month goal.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191031eom5-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for everything,

Tina Smith | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191031eom5-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: this could be my last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |

| | This could be the last email I ever send you. If I don't reach my End of Month goal by midnight -- I will be forced out of this race. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Cory Booker
subject: hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Team,
I'm about to turn in for the night but thought I'd send you a quick note. **We have a huge end-of-month goal of $725,000 -- and we need to hit it by 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
We're only hours away from the deadline, but we still haven't reached our goal. It would mean the world to me if you could help us.
**Here 's a link to chip in right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191031_CB_20191031-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
This team has always hustled for all we've achieved -- whether it was meeting the thresholds to get on the first four debate stages or a big fundraising deadline like the one I'm emailing you about tonight. And every single time, this community found a way to rise to the challenge before us.
We're well within reach. **[Please, donate a few dollars if you can.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191031_CB_20191031-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I'll reach out tomorrow and let you know if we did it.
Thank you,
Cory
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ad9/5fca0d19/763440e8/291c05b0/674035940/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ad9/5fca0d19/763440e8/291c05bf/674035940/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ad9/5fca0d19/763440e8/291c05be/674035940/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ad9/5fca0d19/763440e8/291c05bd/674035940/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ad9/5fca0d19/763440e8/291c05bc/674035940/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ad9/5fca0d19/763440e8/291c05b0/674035940/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: I need your urgent help

body:

| | | Democrats Outraising Republicans Friend, The end of October is almost here and that means it’s almost time to close our fundraising books for the month. **As of moments ago, my campaign was coming up $3,500 short of our October goal.** Friend, the stakes of this race are insanely high. Every national figure has eyes on this race. My opponent and her supporters are already working around the clock to keep this seat under Nancy Pelosi’s influence. I need your immediate help to fight back. [**_If I can count on you for any size contribution up to the legal limit, I would be forever grateful._**](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtkrlk-udthdyhkil-i/) [_**_Yes, TINA! You can count on me!_
DONATE NOW >>>**_](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtkrlk-udthdyhkil-d/) You see, Friend, I’m looking to run a campaign for the people and by the people of Virginia. I’m not looking to be a puppet for outside lobbyists or anyone other than the citizens of our great state. **I am NOT a politician and I have NEVER run for office before.**
Friend, this race isn't going to be easy. I’ll likely be facing a tough primary filled with career politicians who know how to raise money and play political games. [_**I need your immediate online support to run a winning campaign. If you can make a contribution, please click this link or on the button below.**_](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtkrlk-udthdyhkil-h/) [_**_Yes, TINA! You can count on me!_
DONATE NOW >>>**_](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtkrlk-udthdyhkil-k/)
It’s critical to our campaign’s success that we close out each month with the strongest numbers possible. It will not only send a strong signal to my opponents that **we are united and going to WIN next November** , but also ensure we have the funds needed to reach every voter in this district. **Winning won't be easy, but it can and WILL be done.[_And if you can show your support with a contribution of any amount from $35 to $350 to $2,800 to me right now it would mean the world. And it would mean that I can broadcast my conservative message on across this district even sooner._](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jddtkrlk-udthdyhkil-u/)** Thank you for all you’ve done and all you’re going to do for this campaign. Sincerely, Tina Ramirez

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Sign the petition: Stand up to China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand For America
body:
To unsubscribe click [here](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5kbXNncy5uZXQvdT9pZD0xMzYwNjgxOTUuMTU3NDk2ZTNhYjU2NmU1NGRmOGE4YTlkYTIyYjY0OTImbj1UJmw9YS1ncyZvPTY1MjI0Mjg%3d&x=2b8a05b6)

[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111232/2/)

Dear friend,
**China poses a threat to freedom across the globe, and its military is only growing.**
Putting aside China's well-known malicious trade practices and blatant dishonesty, its government has gone beyond just expanding its economic might. Its military is growing. _And it is growing quickly._
The Chinese government has increased military spending by 83% since 2009. Some officials have even said that **China's military technology has now caught up to the United States.**
[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111233/3/)

America cannot allow this trend to continue. China has committed countless human rights abuses, has no respect for international law, and habitually oppresses its own people.
**[Sign the petition against Chinese growth>>](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111233/4/)**
China is not just another trade partner. China is a national security threat, a rival, and the antithesis of American values. Now more than ever, we must keep a watchful eye on the Chinese government. If necessary, we must take action.
**[Add your name to the petition and stand up to China >>](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111233/5/)**
Stand For America is working to promote policies that shed light on Chinese aggression and hold China responsible for its actions. We can't allow the Chinese military to continue down this path of unrestricted growth. Help us in this fight \-- **a fight we intend to win.**
**[Sign the petition and hold China accountable >>](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111233/6/)**
My very best,
[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111233/7/)

[Sign your name today!](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/111233/8/)
---

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6522428/136068195/75219/9/)
Paid for by Stand For America
---
PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: The Legacy of 1 October
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Dear Friend,
On October 1, 2017, Las Vegas became the site of the largest mass shooting in American history. The aftermath of this horrific event left an indelible mark on our state.
However, little action was taken to prevent another massacre. So when I ran for governor I made a promise to do something about it.
Upon our arrival at the capitol, VegasStrong became NevadaStrong. We closed the background check loophole, banned bump stocks and enacted a Red Flag Law to keep guns out of the hands of those deemed a threat to others.
**The gun lobby is relentless, but they 've only strengthened my commitment to ensuring the reforms we passed are fully enforced.**
**We are resilient, we are resolved, and together we CAN prevent another tragedy like 1 October.** **If you 're with me in this crucial fight, I need your financial support right now:**
_[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/_zb7xd4Rq7T2HLHiyALLJENNeO1q-upmy47m608fvlk=/DGbiwNuY5oloHMwBebQD5GU2ANqaFRPInw0M4og9xxU=?amount=10)_
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/_zb7xd4Rq7T2HLHiyALLJENNeO1q-upmy47m608fvlk=/P8WXLZ2O4lTaQjaYEsmL5Vm-Cl8CBO5T0FFSr3slL-g=?amount=25)
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/_zb7xd4Rq7T2HLHiyALLJENNeO1q-upmy47m608fvlk=/P8WXLZ2O4lTaQjaYEsmL5Vm-Cl8CBO5T0FFSr3slL-g=?amount=50)
A governor's most important responsibility is ensuring people are safe, and gun law reform is the most certain way to enhance public safety.
We share a common purpose and I thank you for joining me in this cause.
Stay Strong!

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY COMMITTEE TO ELECT STEVE SISOLAK

subject: Represent your state
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MJQV9UUZMsOjzoiddbWg3KLOwf-v5lJtfDFHvh20CoP_9m3JIWp8e1Y5vo0uxQ9IPOE3cB82a0Yg7MbSUKrWyaqgqOTYTEJBambc7ZzpHWz_rnk8t-zYPPmCmluReAUN4QxrFGfU9FTSoleGY9rYjk2l1TjZIlEQXvXzdGG4qYtbE9lV2brtqA_7lAKeCQ49MSEQMiJlgKB_aPOMuk88Wr-bh-W-IkhZ85AR6VUa3U64kN5iIf3jwW2fL2c14czN3YMe8ocKvR5LXKK1YrXOLu0cVamTkDmaymA0K8cFt4jJxvOBr_Tu4NenGGn8OeTt_-PT-xkCzGwnmqxly7fTM6iMnLgCOC5mSV54TA40TGR7OEUO2A7HMRRB-D9MxB6d&c=2iW4sDPK1nN2Xfk0r4gubMIAv3JLSAN4CtLYnmc9kl2aLwyVKirF2w==&ch=bW7trUF87qiDXojXKVxdN1Fq5QAF6F9zKEom_sRqPxE2FhuJUFspMg==)
---
| | | Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2019-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MJQV9UUZMsOjzoiddbWg3KLOwf-v5lJtfDFHvh20CoP_9m3JIWp8e1Y5vo0uxQ9IPOE3cB82a0Yg7MbSUKrWyaqgqOTYTEJBambc7ZzpHWz_rnk8t-zYPPmCmluReAUN4QxrFGfU9FTSoleGY9rYjk2l1TjZIlEQXvXzdGG4qYtbE9lV2brtqA_7lAKeCQ49MSEQMiJlgKB_aPOMuk88Wr-bh-W-IkhZ85AR6VUa3U64kN5iIf3jwW2fL2c14czN3YMe8ocKvR5LXKK1YrXOLu0cVamTkDmaymA0K8cFt4jJxvOBr_Tu4NenGGn8OeTt_-PT-xkCzGwnmqxly7fTM6iMnLgCOC5mSV54TA40TGR7OEUO2A7HMRRB-D9MxB6d&c=2iW4sDPK1nN2Xfk0r4gubMIAv3JLSAN4CtLYnmc9kl2aLwyVKirF2w==&ch=bW7trUF87qiDXojXKVxdN1Fq5QAF6F9zKEom_sRqPxE2FhuJUFspMg==) There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MJQV9UUZMsOjzoiddbWg3KLOwf-v5lJtfDFHvh20CoP_9m3JIWp8e1Y5vo0uxQ9IPOE3cB82a0Yg7MbSUKrWyaqgqOTYTEJBambc7ZzpHWz_rnk8t-zYPPmCmluReAUN4QxrFGfU9FTSoleGY9rYjk2l1TjZIlEQXvXzdGG4qYtbE9lV2brtqA_7lAKeCQ49MSEQMiJlgKB_aPOMuk88Wr-bh-W-IkhZ85AR6VUa3U64kN5iIf3jwW2fL2c14czN3YMe8ocKvR5LXKK1YrXOLu0cVamTkDmaymA0K8cFt4jJxvOBr_Tu4NenGGn8OeTt_-PT-xkCzGwnmqxly7fTM6iMnLgCOC5mSV54TA40TGR7OEUO2A7HMRRB-D9MxB6d&c=2iW4sDPK1nN2Xfk0r4gubMIAv3JLSAN4CtLYnmc9kl2aLwyVKirF2w==&ch=bW7trUF87qiDXojXKVxdN1Fq5QAF6F9zKEom_sRqPxE2FhuJUFspMg==)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Jason Yates
subject: LIVE EVENT: Join in prayer for the elections next week!
body:
| | Prayer guide and live prayer event
---
| Peter, It’s that time of year again to reset your clocks. Most of the country gains an extra hour this weekend as daylight savings time ends. If you’re anything like me, it is easy to let that extra hour pass you by and sleep a little longer. But this year, we want to encourage you to spend that extra hour in prayer. You don’t have to pray when the clock falls back in the middle of the night, but consider taking an extra hour over the weekend or before the Tuesday, November 5 elections to pray for our nation. More than 49,000 elections are scheduled before the end of 2019. In November alone, 35 states will be conducting elections, the bulk of which are scheduled for Tuesday, November 5. We have two simple opportunities to help you pray for these important elections:
1. Access the 2019 Election Day Prayer to guide your personal prayer time. You can read and download the prayer by clicking this link: [https://www.MyFaithVotes.org/2019-election-day-prayer](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFj7eaJPIfCRhflCGanVsGh6Bn40jLR7xowrIhJIdEJIfg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=1).
2. Join us for a Live Prayer Event on Facebook or YouTube the night before the elections, **November 4 at 8:00 pm ET / 5:00 pm PT** to unite with others all over the country to pray for the elections. You can watch the Live Event by clicking on this link on Monday when the event starts to watch on [Facebook](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-yNNByaJlqefM8sWd_ZbcR206Xs9EXsqZFqgL7ruRCSXw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=2) or [YouTube](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZlkQoXsli9e9OAEwmK_Q8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=3).

I hope you will join us in praying for this nation and for Christians to take action and vote for biblical values and godly candidates in this critical election season. | | _“If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin and will heal their land.”_ 2 Chronicles 7:14
---|---
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-yNNByaJlqefM8sWd_ZbcR206Xs9EXsqZFqgL7ruRCSXw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=4)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZlkQoXsli9e9OAEwmK_Q8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=5)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=6)
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191101com01&n=10)

name: Nikki Foster
subject: I thought the fight of my life would be over Iraq and Afghanistan. But I was wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
Nikki Foster is a US Air Force combat pilot, the daughter of immigrants, and a mom. She's a Democrat running for Congress to flip OH-01 from red to blue. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, you can click [**here**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2342/165208557/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://nikkifoster.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+here&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019"). If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [**here**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2345/165208557/VEsE/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019"). |
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2344/165208557/VEsF/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019")

| | I'm a lot of things. The daughter of immigrants. A United States Air Force combat pilot. A mom. And now a Democratic candidate for United States Congress. I thought the fight of my life would be in the skies -- over the deserts of Iraq and the mountains of Afghanistan. But I was wrong. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - I'm a lot of things. The daughter of immigrants. A United States Air Force combat pilot. A mom. _And now a Democratic candidate for United States Congress._ I thought the fight of my life would be in the skies -- over the deserts of Iraq and the mountains of Afghanistan. **But I was wrong.** It was with my newborn in the Intensive Care Unit at Cincinnati Children's Hospital. Henry is healthy now, but during that time I met so many families struggling to get care their children needed without going bankrupt. I remember turning to my husband Rob and saying, "If we aren't fighting for them, who is?" **Well certainly not Republican Congressman Steve Chabot, who voted to gut the Affordable Care Act -- jeopardizing the care for almost half the kids at Children 's Hospital and allowing insurance companies to discriminate against people, like my son Henry, with pre-existing conditions.** [**If you think it 's time to put people first then please join my campaign for Congress to retire Republican Steve Chabot and flip OH-1 from red to blue in 2020:**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2347/165208557/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+If+you+think+itrsquos+time+to+put+people&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019") [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2346/165208557/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019") | | | [Join Nikki >>](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2359/165208557/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=6+-+Join+Nikki+gtgt&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019")
---
_This campaign is about service._
About serving people, not corporations -- and rejecting money from corporate PACs.
It's about serving families by standing up to insurance company lobbyists and big Pharma executives.
And this campaign is about putting country first and holding lawbreakers accountable even when they occupy the highest office in the land.
[**Will you stand with me and put country first by joining our service-focused campaign today? >>**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce2358/165208557/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=7+-+Will+you+stand+with+me+and+put+country+f&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019")
| | [Add your name >>](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce235b/165208557/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=8+-+Add+your+name+gtgt&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019")
---
In 2018, the Democratic nominee came within four points of winning this race.
_And in a presidential year it will be even more competitive._
That's why we're getting started early. To organize. To do the work. And to fight like hell to win -- and serve the people of Ohio's First Congressional District.
Will you join us?
\-- Nikki
P.S. The strength of our campaign will be judged by how many supporters we have. [**Will you add your name and become a Founding Supporter of our campaign today? ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf75/30a4f917/506a497b/28ce235a/165208557/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/s/NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+add+your+name+and+become+a+Foun&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019&source=NKF_EM_OB_Onboarding_2019")

name: Team Tate
subject: Today is the day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
All that’s missing is your name on the supporter list.
Hi,
Today is the day! President Trump arrives in Mississippi tonight, and Tate is ready to show him how much support there is in Mississippi when he hands him the list of donors. This is a huge opportunity to show President Trump just how big of a win we’ll have next week. **If you haven’t added your name yet, you’re running out of time. name: Cory Booker
subject: Team, I have some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I woke up this morning to some less than ideal news: we missed our $725,000 end-of-month goal by just $18,479. We're fewer than 100 days out from Iowa and need to continue building our campaign. That starts with hitting every goal we set. **It 's time to turn our focus to the next major challenge before us: qualifying for December's DNC debate. But first, will you help close the gap on our October fundraising goal? [We have just $18,479 to go. Donate whatever you can now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191101_CB_20191101-fr-CB-thankyou-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'm going to be relying on you a lot. The only way I'll be able to reach these goals and get on that debate stage is if you stand with me during these make-or-break moments. It won't be easy, but I know we can do this -- together. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191101_CB_20191101-fr-CB-thankyou-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ada/5fca0d19/76380ee4/291c04a0/2339745468/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ada/5fca0d19/76380ee4/291c04af/2339745468/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ada/5fca0d19/76380ee4/291c04ae/2339745468/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ada/5fca0d19/76380ee4/291c04ad/2339745468/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ada/5fca0d19/76380ee4/291c04ac/2339745468/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ada/5fca0d19/76380ee4/291c04a0/2339745468/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hey Peter --

I want to thank you so much for your support.

Your contributions are what keep this grassroots campaign moving -- literally. Your support goes towards fueling my tour of all 39 counties in this district in Sioux City Sue. Thank you for helping us close out October strong!

This could be the last email I send to you.

Yesterday was my October fundraising deadline and unfortunately, **_I missed my goal_**.

I’ve been given one more chance to hit our target but if **[I don’t raise an additional $25,000 before midnight](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=0c505d3dc8d04ee5a5b91d08e9a15c48&_e=SnNN8pxhMXGzaDp2-tGGxoFiRBkSeNuF8TxV19ax7H13Df6ymlMQ0NEOU_6ti9ejOUZe5_GnenZNtVAYnDeWseXrSJNwOlUOllQ_C3XsDdjDToQtw5hvUIc8ShHekrAxlgeM8vs0PTcZ42YhUM1HsBbVoQcn0K68TLUjBPtv6VjSgEkSuHga8npnTdW46KB06W3G-OEF1isjgkHW6FVb7dokL0jKj51Y5HPuLHLlDOrCBSxqgTFcgr0sMbbPQmUJrwFk_YZqt-4e6avzakS2TIGZCMx-3dwlLILIVEdlaDYr79Mh6lknnVIMeitpzeAQfIyCSQUakeOzmo5ps9uLtFfCC3SmHJZfAr86XwG76c5Ss_TSAxVIvwbW12eSebA-tlgigBQF3vvdWrhtBj4kdA%3D%3D)** – my race to put America First is dead.

In all my years in public service if there’s one thing I’m guilty of – _it’s being brutally honest_.

Well Friend, things aren’t looking good right now. My plan of winning re-election, securing our borders, locking up violent criminals, and being an adamant defender of President Trump could be over by midnight.

It will take grassroots supporters, like yourself, to step up right now to keep my campaign alive.

subject: re: Support Our President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
These days it seems like you can hardly turn on your TV without hearing a stream of lies from the left, and from the liberal media, about President Tr [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=78c83634428d4341b11012b96c05e185&_e=_w1-_aBKQR9HuFHb7KAbxs6M427xVg47Un3aAcWlQjWEYxTz2ZcjvK7IHr-Q4UeVZegx6OfgDBKEw-xAdnkruO7Lk_kENfkaNrU50zXFhXl49hwLHlerr7DWNNod5oNSUfshv64yd4QcHs08XPCisQoWi0K0Z8cvOspnSvxkS7cv6EQ8c9y6xInXgUiPIGMjJFzvhZvr_1AvrJWpV76UsAm-kdavwHtUaZi4KZ_CjjBKig3da37uxS53jrbtLS8On-l6KGiaE2WghRwDE6ohviXRA88CWFNXpcs6CoZ9IBd5PdzpIJpscO886qjNvkuHMuJBSXtcbM4k3SkzTpAWZYPr2f4pqy7oXUym8lVOHjsRklgdL3ejAAT3APa_ApsGPEiLA9_cRDu9AxzMeDeITcvxSLLfDjhxeD7veFdfahA%3D) | |

Peter,

These days it seems like you can hardly turn on your TV without hearing a stream of lies from the left, and from the liberal media, about President Trump.

The mainstream media and House Democrats have shown their cards, launching baseless attacks and even impeachment, without ANY regard for the truth.

We must take a stand against their attempts to SILENCE New Yorkers and throw out our President!
[ **STAND UP NOW** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=78c83634428d4341b11012b96c05e185&_e=_w1-_aBKQR9HuFHb7KAbxs6M427xVg47Un3aAcWlQjWEYxTz2ZcjvK7IHr-Q4UeVZegx6OfgDBKEw-xAdnkruO7Lk_kENfkaNrU50zXFhXl49hwLHlerr7DWNNod5oNSUfshv64yd4QcHs08XPCisQoWi0K0Z8cvOspnSvxkS7cv6EQ8c9y6xInXgUiPIGMjJFzvhZvr_1AvrJWpV76UsKAFe4d02lgVi0X4ZSvByl-E6BNFvlLBX--s-T_2pnGnnRANLbhmeg9i_vurLC1mCoNGzrXvsSZ6yLfWEbcI5OKUzAIkZVw5Ec_MohtmK6mCPJKXRbOOjCmqevKQoAgi_VTj3KHksHj6bR3ivdn1YGM_4AKXyBsdzpJKKM7TRqWWalD3d03t23x9r2s-TUWqqG2SRBawzhti0RuGqLKfgvo%3D)
Peter, I know that right now, it might seem like the left has us beat. They've got the fake news on their side, after all.

But I know New Yorkers... we've never backed down from fighting for what's right before and we CANNOT afford to start now.

It’s time to put the distraction tactics behind us and help President Trump focus on the Americans that deserve to be heard. Our veterans. Our middle class. Our hardworking men and women who are the backbone of this economy.

I stand with our President and today I need you to join me by signing my petition to defend President Trump:

Claudia

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Today, I'm releasing my plan to pay for Medicare for All. My plan won't raise middle-class taxes by one penny. In fact, my plan puts $11 trillion back in the pockets of American families by... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528da7/45c30650/10120ce07/66f5588f/2479616571/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We need a health care system that reflects our values.

No American should ever die or go bankrupt because of health care costs. And no for-profit insurance company should be able to stop any American from getting the care they need.

**Health care is a human right, and that 's why I'm fighting for Medicare for All.** It's the only plan that gives everyone in America full coverage, with the freedom to see any provider, with no premiums, copays, and deductibles -- no restrictions, no surprises, and no one going broke because they get sick.

**Today, I 'm releasing my plan to pay for Medicare for All. My plan won't raise middle-class taxes by one penny.** In fact, my plan puts $11 trillion back in the pockets of American families by virtually eliminating their current premiums, deductibles, and copays -- that's bigger than any tax cut in American history.

To cover the cost, we start by taking the money that employers are currently paying in the form of premiums to private insurance companies and have them pay it to Medicare instead.

We make up the difference with targeted spending cuts, new taxes on giant corporations, Wall Street, and the richest 1%, and cracking down on tax evasion and fraud.

**[See for yourself: Try our new calculator to see what our plan for Medicare for All would mean for you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528da7/45c30650/10120ce07/66f558f3/2479616571/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwwMk9fUkxUX000QV9FXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/calculator/medicare-for-all?source=EML02O_RLT_M4A_E_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Health care is personal for you, personal for me, and personal for every family in America.

My daddy's heart attack nearly sent our family skidding over a financial cliff.

Today, I think about all the kids this year who will face the double blow of nearly losing a parent and then watching their lives turn upside down as their families struggle to pay a growing stack of medical bills.

I spent my career studying why so many hard-working middle-class families were going broke. For years, my research partners and I traveled across the country, from bankruptcy courtroom to bankruptcy courtroom, talking directly with people who'd seen their lives turned upside down.

One of the biggest reasons we found? Medical problems. In 2007, my research found that the number one reason families were going broke was health care -- and three quarters of those who declared bankruptcy after an illness were people who already had health insurance.

Between 2013 and 2016, the number one reason families went broke was still because of health care -- even though 91.2% of Americans had health insurance in 2016.

**It 's clear: Families are getting crushed by health costs. But you know who's doing great? Private health insurance companies -- they're sucking billions of dollars in profits out of the system.**

Under Medicare for All, we'll rein in the corruption, waste, inefficiency, and corporate profiteering in our health care system.

And we can pay for it without any new taxes for middle-class families. Existing federal and state spending on health care stays about the same. Business spending on health care stays about the same -- payments just go to Medicare instead of private insurers. And yeah, big corporations, Wall Street, and the top 1% pay their fair share.

**Everyone 's covered, it's fully paid for, and independent economists have verified that it's doable. This is how we end the stranglehold of health care costs on American families and provide one of the greatest federal expansions of middle-class wealth in history.**

**[In just a few steps, use our calculator to find out how Medicare for All would affect you. And share what you see with your friends, your family -- with everyone you know.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528da7/45c30650/10120ce07/66f558f3/2479616571/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwwMk9fUkxUX000QV9FXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/calculator/medicare-for-all?source=EML02O_RLT_M4A_E_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Person to person, story by story, we'll fight the misinformation from giant health insurance and drug companies who are desperate to stop anything from getting in the way of their profits. We'll make it clear why we need to fight for Medicare for All -- because it will make a real difference in people's lives.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**TRY THE CALCULATOR**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528da7/45c30650/10120ce07/66f558f3/2479616571/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwwMk9fUkxUX000QV9FXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/calculator/medicare-for-all?source=EML02O_RLT_M4A_E_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: Andy Beshear
subject: A special thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
As we head into the final few days of the campaign I want to extend a special thank you to everyone who stepped up and donated last week for our final end-of-month deadline.
|
---

| | Peter --

It's hard to believe this election is only _four days away_.

**As we head into the final few days of the campaign I want to extend a special thank you to everyone who stepped up and donated last week for our final end-of-month deadline**. Because of you, we're going into these last days in a really strong position.

**Peter, the polls show this race is a tossup.** It's all going to come down to voter turnout. Because of the dedicated volunteers who've been knocking on thousands of doors, and generous supporters like you, I'm optimistic that we're going to send Matt Bevin packing on Tuesday and start building a Kentucky that works for _everyone_.

If you didn't get a chance to donate last week or would like to give this campaign just a little boost heading into Election Day, it's not too late. You can chip in right now at [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-fourdays**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557981/ad6dc73/17bfc96f/db70d43/2005921091/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQyNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeomty?refcode=20191101.1nd__427__&amount=5").

**Thank you so much -- your support means the world to Jacqueline and me.**

\-- Andy | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557981/ad6dc73/17bfc96f/db70d43/2005921091/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQyNyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-octeomty?refcode=20191101.1nd__427__&amount=5")**
---

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Can you help us make sure voters have the information they need to vote this month?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Our fight is about ensuring every vote counts, in every election, every year. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/7037699/696786496/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Yesterday, we saw some pretty spooky stuff as folks celebrated Halloween. But the truth is that no ghost, goblin, or ghoul is as scary as efforts to suppress the vote. In just four days, voters across Georgia, Virginia, Mississippi, and Kentucky will head to the polls to vote in critical elections up and down the ballot. And on November 16, voters in Louisiana have an important run-off election. These elections will determine everything from the make-up of city councils in Georgia to the composition of state legislatures in Virginia and statewide office holders in Mississippi, Kentucky, and Louisiana. Our fight is about ensuring every vote counts, in every election, every year. You can make a difference by getting involved and ensuring voters have the information they need to get out and vote this month! **[SUPPORT GEORGIA](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a6/696786496/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdNZezxunQdvuPrv3PTwN6duXpQmM6xExOcvZGA94dUWEK5Gw/viewform")** **[SUPPORT KENTUCKY](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a7/696786496/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/kydems/")** **[SUPPORT LOUISIANA](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a4/696786496/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/louisianademocrats/")** **[SUPPORT MISSISSIPPI](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a5/696786496/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/intent/retweet?tweet_id=1190008721331634179")** **[SUPPORT VIRGINIA](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a2/696786496/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/")** As Stacey Abrams said earlier this week, elections are about people, and the people have the right to be heard in every election, every time. Together, we can make good on our nation's promise to create a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. In service,
Team Fair Fight
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a3/696786496/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a0/696786496/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa541/34a064cc/1b390738/70376a1/696786496/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

clean_body: Our fight is about ensuring every vote counts, in every election, every year. | "" | | | Friend - Yesterday, we saw some pretty spooky stuff as folks celebrated Halloween. But the truth is that no ghost, goblin, or ghoul is as scary as efforts to suppress the vote. In just four days, voters across Georgia, Virginia, Mississippi, and Kentucky will head to the polls to vote in critical elections up and down the ballot. And on November 16, voters in Louisiana have an important run-off election. These elections will determine everything from the make-up of city councils in Georgia to the composition of state legislatures in Virginia and statewide office holders in Mississippi, Kentucky, and Louisiana. Our fight is about ensuring every vote counts, in every election, every year. You can make a difference by getting involved and ensuring voters have the information they need to get out and vote this month! "" "" "" "" "" As Stacey Abrams said earlier this week, elections are about people, and the people have the right to be heard in every election, every time. Together, we can make good on our nation's promise to create a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. In service, Team Fair Fight | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2019 Fair Fight PAC, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. "" | | Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www.fairfight.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
Thanks for joining us | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=9df2524870&e=6e84008331)
---
| |
---
| | Welcome to Team Reynolds!

Thank you for becoming a part of the team. We appreciate your support for our campaign. Steering Congress back on a track to legislate effectively and be a true representation of the people starts with choosing leaders who care more about solving our country's problems than their own personal ambitions. Too often our elected officials lose sight of the purpose of their positions---to _serve_ the nation.
---
| In order to fulfill that service to the people I will not be accepting any corporate PAC money. Your donations will be the funding that makes this grassroots campaign a success. Many thanks to those who have already contributed to reestablish what Abraham Lincoln called a government of, by, and for the people!
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Bring a jacket!
body:
Good morning Peter,
It's getting pretty chilly out there, but that's not going to stop us from knocking on doors. Tomorrow morning at 9:00 AM, we'll be block walking in Doss Park, and we want you to join us (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/148219/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1a55e98c26-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_01_02_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1a55e98c26-32267927) !
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1a55e98c26-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_01_02_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1a55e98c26-32267927
Sign up! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/148219/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=1a55e98c26-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_01_02_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-1a55e98c26-32267927)
Don't miss this chance to come out and meet our neighbors, and let them know what we're doing to make District 18 better!

See you there,

name: Chris Zook, Political Director
subject: Block Walk with Wes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Thanks to your hard work and support, our campaign is off to a great start. We've been endorsed by Senator Ted Cruz, knocked on over 15,000 doors and raised more than $1,000,000!

But if we're going to win in November 2020, we need to keep our foot on the gas pedal. That's why we need you to join us tomorrow, Saturday, November 2nd, for our first official **Block Walking with Wesley!**

Meet at our office at 11511 Katy Fwy tomorrow at 9am to knock on doors with Wesley or stop by anytime 9am-2pm to find out how you can help us get the message out in your neighborhood!

Sincerely,

Chris Zook,
Political Director

subject: do you approve of President Trump? -- ◉ NO! ◎ YES
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you approve of Donald Trump's disastrous Presidency?
---
| | | HISTORIC TRUMP APPROVAL POLL **FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com** Quickly -- my House colleagues and I just took a **_HISTORIC_** vote to hold Trump accountable for his abuse of power. He's livid -- so I'm launching an emergency poll to prove just how fed up every American is with this president's corruption, too. 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you approve of Donald Trump's disastrous Presidency? _[**_NO! >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec9c/3719698819/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20191101_em_pet_b1_tvvbrl_all_v1")_** _**[_Yes_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec9c/3719698819/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20191101_em_pet_b1_tvvbrl_all_v1")**_**
---

I need your immediate attention:

My House colleagues and I just took a _**HISTORIC**_ vote on President Trump.

[**_He 's furious -- so I'm launching an emergency poll to prove just how fed up every American is with this president's abuse of power. Will you respond before midnight? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec9c/3719698819/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20191101_em_pet_b1_tvvbrl_all_v1")

I mean this with every fiber of my being:

After pressuring a foreign government to interfere in our elections...

After threatening our most sacred democratic institutions...

After flat-out abusing his Presidential power...

**I know we finally have a historic shot to DENOUNCE this president 's corruption.**

I need you to raise your voice in this critical moment.

**[_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 10,000 anti-Trump responses to prove we won 't stand by while this president threatens everything we hold dear. Will you take my Trump Approval Poll before midnight tonight? >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec9c/3719698819/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/trump-approval-survey2?source=20191101_em_pet_b1_tvvbrl_all_v1")**

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec9d/3719698819/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec92/3719698819/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec93/3719698819/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec90/3719698819/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec91/3719698819/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b448/18e32a7f/53ed59b6/7b22ec96/3719698819/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

Friend,

I just wanted to follow up real quick here. I didn’t see you name on the list to attend the Team Cornyn Day of Action TOMORROW, Nov. 2. The Senator asked me to follow up to see if I can get you to attend.
We are partnering with Abbot’s campaign and the Republican Party of Texas’ Volunteer Engagement Project to help KEEP TEXAS RED.

**I cannot stress the importance of the event! Our Day of Action will help show Senate Democrats and the liberal media that Texas is NOT for sale.[Will you sign up immediately to help stick it to Chuck Schumer and CNN? ](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=71fb2de21d354599994e421a19ceb60d&_e=e-WyGnZZ2diMQ6LgNv0Dzmp6mMj2D78oI0kNKD1tSl5_7-BQQ1hlEbMroUebxgMjbeJegb2zVFKzxQF4Q4w3CUlvrrxm8sQy5Uq36PDWRfAXjRVYO-tTmoEkCBvyEgKOBA2X0m-5MY32LA4I4E58ttRkHbYb2_d9KAdVWum3zOHgke_M8Qor9GNXLkViOxksu2PqpBNfIW2rKQJuY-TdqrHZO7QxBxiXO8b2VUhbFW8_eDTis5a4SKMhiRWa2uu7tJFOnXhbFWlnQEc5Dv3nCjnoLMaRQ5Yjxe8gzeQff2omrOpUzatowdTou8ugfiaXzovmy0Dj2TNZK4PFw4VC1MSKC6seBnpKwf5YxbdY0AjNXi6YHb9PXfOOo8n0y84bvhGaB2xD0HYUN6q7B7ccPwZeJBUnGzBLb4s20yNZu5SH5WogyxU6Ah9UOqyrfQTF7iMMRFgdH3mFI7duRk3B1Q%3D%3D)**

If the Democrats flip Texas blue, all of these things could happen very soon. Don’t delay, friend - sign up for the Day of Action now!

John Jackson
Campaign Manager

\-----Forwarded Message Below------

Friend,
Are you passionate about keeping Texas red in 2020, friend? If so, join us on Saturday, November 2 for our Team Cornyn Day of Action! We are partnering with the Abbott campaign and RPT’s Volunteer Engagement Project for this Red Alert TX event and we need your help.
We will be knocking on doors to spread our conservative message, learning new digital strategies for supporting my campaign and meeting fellow volunteers in your area. My campaign will be set up at five different locations in Denton, Williamson, Harris, Tarrant, and Dallas counties to meet you.
**I need supporters who are willing to step up to fend off the Democrats from flipping Texas blue. Will you sign up to attend one of my events?**
