This is your chance to make a difference. Will you help tell your fellow Texans that John Cornyn rejects Californian liberalism and instead supports the hard-working, red-blooded Americans who make our state great?
****[FIND YOUR DAY OF ACTION SITE](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=71fb2de21d354599994e421a19ceb60d&_e=e-WyGnZZ2diMQ6LgNv0Dzmp6mMj2D78oI0kNKD1tSl5_7-BQQ1hlEbMroUebxgMjbeJegb2zVFKzxQF4Q4w3CUlvrrxm8sQy5Uq36PDWRfAXjRVYO-tTmoEkCBvyEgKOBA2X0m-5MY32LA4I4E58ttRkHbYb2_d9KAdVWum3zOHgke_M8Qor9GNXLkViOxksu2PqpBNfIW2rKQJuY-TdqrHZO7QxBxiXO8b2VUhbFW9sOmuNZE35Q90w-h9A_E0Oix_bKeM--Izw9Jx1Galb419eSS5E7wFecgludfdExyDBdmDOezr1MbclaGv_SikX_DA6-L73IoXbOMoWWVOsixUZNt6WlhWvudBpuLKJPkS82jg00xfRgCrSECxwddcf4gzAWUvADmieo5p1TGSBwR4aid2pZUTsn5sAZvJB2qxv3yY0gKdBdP4Fk8EMq3M2qb70ciGnjn-Xz9b3TZXjGQ%3D%3D)** **

John Cornyn

| | Hi Peter, In her news conference before the House impeachment rules vote yesterday, Nancy Pelosi eloquently summed up what's going on: "The times have found us." The lessons we learned in civics classes, the moments the Founding Fathers warned us about, the lines we thought our government would never cross. They have found us. While Republicans bury their heads in the sand and ignore the facts, Democrats in the House are moving forward, so we NEED to know where the average Democratic voter stands: **Do you support impeaching Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc71/6e9863e8/15e320cd/1db0866c/1917827101/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/jqsKhnkK") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc71/6e9863e8/15e320cd/1db0866c/1917827101/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/jqsKhnkK") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc71/6e9863e8/15e320cd/1db08672/1917827101/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191101b.ND-b&refcode2=cWgLvVWW5zjcLEfEaBil")

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Guess who's coming to dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Virginia Republicans have called in the heavyweights. Ahead of Tuesday's Virginia election, Mike Pence is coming to Virginia Beach tomorrow for a last-minute rally.
|
---
| | **[Mike Pence is campaigning with one of Mark's opponents tomorrow. Help Mark fight back!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7ed/53d9897e/523bf5cf/1c891054/2988555859/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vafirst?refcode=20191101nd__316__&refcode2=top1&amount=5")** | **[DONATE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7ed/53d9897e/523bf5cf/1c891053/2988555859/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vafirst?refcode=20191101nd__316__&refcode2=top2&amount=5")**
---
Derek,

**Virginia Republicans have called in the heavyweights.** Ahead of Tuesday's Virginia election, Mike Pence is coming to Virginia Beach tomorrow for a last-minute rally.

Guess who's introducing Pence? One of Mark's opponents: former Congressman **_Scott Taylor_**.
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7ed/53d9897e/523bf5cf/1c891052/2988555859/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMxNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vafirst?refcode=20191101nd__316__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Before he lost re-election to the House of Representatives, **Taylor voted with Trump _97.8%_ of the time**. If he wins Mark's Senate seat, who do you think he'll put first: Virginians or Donald Trump?

**Virginia doesn't need another rubber stamp for Donald Trump. We need Mark Warner fighting for us in the Senate. Chip in right now if you agree.**

[The outpouring of support we've received from friends like you since I announced my campaign for president has been nothing short of remarkable. Time and again, you've come through.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae51/134673f2/a424ce7/6997ca8f/1679185094/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: It’s Voting Time!
body:
Snow flurries may have officially been spotted in Indiana this week. But before we enter the winter or holiday season, it’s time to finish – and....

It's Voting Time

Snow flurries may have officially been spotted in Indiana this week. But before we enter the winter or holiday season, it’s time to finish – and finish strong – our current season: campaign season. And campaign season has now reached its peak – voting time!

With early voting now available and Election Day approaching on Tuesday, over the next few days you’ll see Governor Holcomb and me joining our Republican mayoral candidates and municipal teams throughout the state. Earlier today we were in Lawrence and Muncie, and tonight we’ll be in Fort Wayne. Tomorrow we’ll be in Elkhart, Valparaiso, and Kokomo, and then we’ll finish strong on Monday in Terre Haute, Washington, Jeffersonville, and New Albany.

It’s a lot of miles in three days, but it’s critical that we make sure that we help these local candidates cross the finish line first on Election Night, because Governor Holcomb needs partners at the local level to help keep Indiana on the right track.

And you can help, too. Go vote this weekend, go vote Monday morning, or head to the polls anytime between 6 a.m. and 6 p.m. on Tuesday. Every vote matters (especially in our local races), so let’s finish strong and ensure that Republican leaders can continue to deliver results in cities and towns throughout our state.

PHOTO: Earlier today, Governor Holcomb and Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer campaigned in Muncie to support mayoral candidate Dan Ridenour. This is the second of 10 campaign stops Governor Holcomb is making across the state between now and the election.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Indiana’s Future Leaders: Halloween Edition

It’s been another busy, but fun-filled week for Governor Holcomb! He hosted Halloween at the Governor’s Residence, where trick-or-treaters also had the opportunity to meet First Lady Janet Holcomb and First Dog Henry dressed up as a dinosaur at the Jurassic Park-themed party! He also welcomed over 70,000 attendees of the 92^nd Annual FFA Convention to Indiana.
* Governor Holcomb welcomed trick-or-treaters to the Governor’s Residence for a unique Halloween experience. While there, trick-or-treaters also had the opportunity to meet First Lady Janet Holcomb and First Dog Henry dressed up! Trick-or-treating at the Governor’s Residence has always been a fun tradition for families in the area!
* Governor Holcomb also welcomed attendees of the Annual FFA Convention to Indiana. The FFA is a youth organization that helps promote and support agricultural education in middle school and high school. With Indiana’s long agricultural history, it makes sense for the FFA to host their convention in the Hoosier State!

Governor Holcomb is continuing the theme of Putting People First. Hosting trick-or-treaters and their families or giving a warm greeting to FFA Convention attendees will leave a long lasting, positive impact for Indiana’s future leaders!
Vote Now!
Early voting is underway for municipal elections throughout Indiana! Have you voted yet? If not, this weekend is a great time opportunity!

Visit the Indiana Secretary of State’s Official Voter Portal – IndianaVoters.com (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2cc470db4c&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) – now to get your latest voting info, including a full list of candidates on your ballot, your polling (and early voting) locations and hours, and more!
Easy Way to Make a Big Difference:
Statewide Republican Phone Bank:

Want to help our Indiana Republican mayoral candidates, but don't know how? Join your Indiana Republican Party (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=560df98e62&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) this weekend, Monday and Tuesday to help make phone calls to voters, encouraging them to get out and vote for our Republican mayoral candidates across the state!

We’ve got multiple days of fun phone banks – and lots of opportunities to help:

Indiana GOP Phone Banks
Indiana GOP HQ – Downtown Indianapolis

Friday, Nov. 1: 5 p.m. – 9 p.m.
Saturday, Nov. 2: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m.
Sunday, Nov. 3: 12 p.m. – 8 p.m.
Monday, Nov. 4: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m.
Tuesday, Nov. 5: 9 p.m. – 5:45 p.m.

It’s an easy way to make a big difference to help our candidates win their races and deliver results for Hoosiers. RSVP here now! (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=298a0d83be&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Upcoming Republican Events

November 1 (http://indiana.gop/events/brown-county-lincoln-day-dinner-1?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner
November 1 (http://indiana.gop/events/sullivan-county-fall-dinner-0?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Sullivan County Fall Dinner
November 5: Election Day
November 14 (http://indiana.gop/events/23rd-annual-henry-county-republican-club-speech-contest-high-school-students?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : 23rd Annual Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for HS Students
December 6 (http://indiana.gop/events/greater-indianapolis-republican-womens-club-holiday-luncheon-and-silent-auction?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Holiday Luncheon and Silent Auction December 14 (http://indiana.gop/events/irfw-holiday-brunch?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : IRFW Holiday Brunch

**Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at info@indiana.go (mailto:info@indiana.go) p (mailto:info@indiana.go) ! **

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb attends commissioning of USS Indianapolis in Burns Harbor (https://abc7chicago.com/community-events/thousands-attend-commissioning-of-navys-newest-combat-ship-at-indiana-port/5650165/?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch gives advice to aspiring female politicians (https://www.journalgazette.net/news/local/20191027/women-give-advice-to-aspiring-politicians?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Secretary of State Connie Lawson encourages early voting (https://www.facebook.com/connie.lawson.773/videos/2481160048643070/?mc_cid=fbe918d71f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

While there, trick-or-treaters also had the opportunity to meet First Lady Janet Holcomb and First Dog Henry dressed up! Trick-or-treating at the Governor’s Residence has always been a fun tradition for families in the area! Governor Holcomb also welcomed attendees of the Annual FFA Convention to Indiana. The FFA is a youth organization that helps promote and support agricultural education in middle school and high school. With Indiana’s long agricultural history, it makes sense for the FFA to host their convention in the Hoosier State! Governor Holcomb is continuing the theme of Putting People First. Hosting trick-or-treaters and their families or giving a warm greeting to FFA Convention attendees will leave a long lasting, positive impact for Indiana’s future leaders! Vote Now! Early voting is underway for municipal elections throughout Indiana! Have you voted yet? If not, this weekend is a great time opportunity! Visit the Indiana Secretary of State’s Official Voter Portal – IndianaVoters.com (]) – now to get your latest voting info, including a full list of candidates on your ballot, your polling (and early voting) locations and hours, and more! Easy Way to Make a Big Difference: Statewide Republican Phone Bank: Want to help our Indiana Republican mayoral candidates, but don't know how? Join your Indiana Republican Party (]) this weekend, Monday and Tuesday to help make phone calls to voters, encouraging them to get out and vote for our Republican mayoral candidates across the state! We’ve got multiple days of fun phone banks – and lots of opportunities to help: Indiana GOP Phone Banks Indiana GOP HQ – Downtown Indianapolis Friday, Nov. 1: 5 p.m. – 9 p.m. Saturday, Nov. 2: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m. Sunday, Nov. 3: 12 p.m. – 8 p.m. Monday, Nov. 4: 9 a.m. – 9 p.m. Tuesday, Nov. 5: 9 p.m. – 5:45 p.m. It’s an easy way to make a big difference to help our candidates win their races and deliver results for Hoosiers. RSVP here now! (]) Upcoming Republican Events November 1 (]) : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner November 1 (]) : Sullivan County Fall Dinner November 5: Election Day November 14 (]) : 23rd Annual Henry County Republican Club Speech Contest for HS Students December 6 (]) : Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Holiday Luncheon and Silent Auction December 14 (]) : IRFW Holiday Brunch Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at info@indiana.go (mailto:info@indiana.go) p (mailto:info@indiana.go) ! News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb attends commissioning of USS Indianapolis in Burns Harbor (]) Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch gives advice to aspiring female politicians (]) Secretary of State Connie Lawson encourages early voting (]) Auditor Tera Klutz promotes National Retirement Security Week (]) Senator Todd Young promotes Drain Act to move federal agencies to middle America (]) Senator Mike Braun supports Prescription Drug Pricing Reduction Act (]) Congresswoman Jackie Walorski continues to raise awareness of school bus safety (]) Congressman Jim Banks says President Trump was right when going after al-Baghdadi (]) Congressman Jim Baird promotes resources for opioid addiction (]) Congresswoman Susan Brooks introduces bill to increase funding for breast screenings (]) Congressman Greg Pence helped assemble USO care packages for service members (]) Congressman Larry Bucshon supports aluminum association establishing monitoring system (]) Congressman Trey Hollingsworth discusses using bridge to "revitalize" New Albany (]) ============================================================

subject: You're personally invited

|

I'm personally inviting you to a virtual dialogue with Cortney Tunis, Executive Director of Pantsuit Nation, on her vision of the world today through the lens of Pantsuit Nation on Tuesday, November 5, 6 P.M. to 7 P.M. CST. Tickets are only $25, and you must register in advance to receive the link after purchase.

**You can purchase a ticket here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d67/382d5bd5/7302f85/3b075ba4/3690232716/VEsE/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr?refcode=ev191029psn")**

Cortney Tunis is an outspoken champion of diverse leadership across the world of nonprofits. She has worked in the arts, higher education, executive search, and currently runs Pantsuit Nation - an online organization that builds community to encourage civic participation.

**You can purchase a ticket here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d67/382d5bd5/7302f85/3b075ba4/3690232716/VEsF/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr?refcode=ev191029psn")**

Thank you, Josh

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: What is your top priority?
body:
What is your top priority? | | | |
---
| | |
# What Is Your Top Priority?
---
|
---
| First, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for joining me as I kicked off my congressional campaign at the end of September. As you know, one year ago, during November 2018, together, we brought our district closer to victory than we've been in years! We are going to continue building on that progress, win the primary, and get Tom Emmer a one-way ticket back to Minnesota.

We know that Rep. Emmer is not spending his time in Washington fighting for the needs of working families in Minnesota. Instead, he is spending his time defending Donald Trump. **And that’s not what we need in our member of Congress! **

We need someone who will work for you everyday, fighting for you! That’s why I’m running. And I’m so encouraged by the fact that all of you believe I can make a positive change.

>From health care, to the environment, to merely ensuring Congress performs its essential oversight duties that are required by the Constitution, there is no shortage of issues facing Minnesota and the United States.

**Since there are so many issues facing our nation, I want to know:[What is your top concern?](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=d58b63a044&e=c56804a14d) Please take a moment, and complete the brief, 1-question form below!**

[What is Your Top Priority?](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=dbff03837e&e=c56804a14d)

---
|
---
| |
## Let’s Put People Over Big Pharma
---
| | ****
---
| | [Legislation ](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=68c1efb8da&e=c56804a14d)in the U.S. House is moving closer to a vote that would allow the government to negotiate to reduce the cost of life-savings prescription drugs -- for the first time. We have been fighting for the ability negotiate drug prices for years!

While [this legislation could be much stronger](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=f0d9433664&e=c56804a14d), it is a good first step. The non-partisan Congressional Budget Office estimates savings of $345 billion for Medicare over seven years. But that’s not all, there would be $158 billion in household savings because of lower insurance premiums and lower prescription co-pays.

Together, we are going to end the business model that puts pharmaceutical industry profits over the health and safety of people in Minnesota. Together, we are going to fight to put people over Big Pharma.

[Stand With Me. Together, we can restore a focus to needs of working families. Donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=49c0b1d9a2&e=c56804a14d)
---
|
---
| |
## **Fighting for a Renewable
Energy Future**
---
| | ****
---
| I was delighted to attend a public hearing in St. Cloud in late October about Xcel Energy's plan to produce 100% carbon-free electricity by 2050. I’m glad Xcel Energy has a plan to completely eliminate carbon emissions.******However, 30 years is too long to wait.**

Also, I don't believe the zero emission plan is actually an environmental plan. I believe that it is an economic plan. Xcel sees the writing on the wall.

Clearly, renewable energy is becoming cheaper and cheaper everyday, and it has already surpassed many forms of energy production. This trend will only continue.

The only reason, for example, a fracked gas power plant is economically feasible has everything to do with massive subsidies still being pumped into the fossil fuel industry. If those subsidies would end, I cannot believe it would take 30 years to turn our energy economy around. Think of it this way: If these massive subsidies were, instead, granted to renewable energy -- and not fossil fuels -- how quickly do you think the entire country would switch to zero emissions?

I bet it'd be earlier than 2050.

[Together, let’s fight to move aggressively away from fossil fules and toward renewable energies. Donate today to show your support!](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=7c8150585c&e=c56804a14d)
---
|
---
|
## **A Responsibility Rep. Emmer
Doesn’t Understand**
---
| ****
---
| Congressman Emmer [recently said](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=fe84c37435&e=c56804a14d) Democrats have an “obsession with their hatred" for Donald Trump. What Congressman Emmer is failing to understand is Democrats have launched an impeachment inquiry in the House of Representatives not because of "their hatred" for the president, but because of their responsibility to follow the U.S. Constitution. Whether members of Congress like or dislike the president is beside the point.

Congress is a co-equal branch of government. To serve in Congress -- and represent the people of Minnesota well -- you must understand that you have a Constitutional responsibility to pursue the facts and hold the president accountable. Impeaching a president isn’t something I take lightly. But it is of the utmost importance that we follow the U.S. Constitution and support the rule of law. One of the bedrocks of our democracy is that no one is above the law. We cannot set the precedent that we don’t hold our leaders accountable.
---
|
---
| **LASTLY, A WELCOME TO TAWNJA:** I wanted to take a moment to welcome Tawnja Zahradka to the race to unseat Tom Emmer. Having more candidates enter the race is healthy for our democracy -- and is a strong signal that our congressional district has the potential to flip blue.
---
| | [](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=d0d41c3a7c&e=c56804a14d)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2019 Ian Todd for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you signed up for email updates either online or at one of our events.

**Our mailing address is:**
Ian Todd for Congress1974 Peach Dr NESauk Rapids, MN 56379-4579
[Add us to your address book](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=28710cd7a6)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=28710cd7a6&e=c56804a14d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=28710cd7a6&e=c56804a14d&c=d541d78b10).

---

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Here's Skye in the winning costume. Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
It was a tight race (get used to those!), but here she is: | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146a/691c9bd/6fe67bdd/11a78199/1652268542/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, earlier this week we asked for your help to choose the Halloween costume for my dog, Skye. You had three choices: a taco, a shark, and Yoda.

It was a tight race (get used to those!), but here she is in her miniature Jedi glory: [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191101_JH_20191101-fr-JH-skyeyoda-all_all_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Not only did we get a smile out of this--we were so grateful to see so many folks step up with the clock ticking before our October deadline. That support has put us in great shape for the next leg of this race.

In the moments that matter most, this team always steps up. For that, thank you. That generosity, loyalty, and dedication are what's going to help us bring change to Washington.

I'm so grateful to have you by my side.

Talk soon,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191101_JH_20191101-fr-JH-skyeyoda-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146a/691c9bd/6fe67bdd/11a78195/1652268542/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146a/691c9bd/6fe67bdd/11a78192/1652268542/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146a/691c9bd/6fe67bdd/11a78193/1652268542/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146a/691c9bd/6fe67bdd/11a78190/1652268542/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: WE DID IT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d17/4006127555/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")
---
| | Last week, we challenged ourselves to raise $800,000 by October 31st because we believed in the strength of Team Julian. And today, we are happy to announce that because of your amazing support, **WE DID IT!** **Team Juli an not only raised $800,000 but went on to raise more than $1 million in the month of October.** Thank you to the 50,000 donors across the country that stepped up when we needed you most! | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d16/4006127555/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/event/119992/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")
---

You shared your stories. You asked your friends and family. You made calls. You chipped in. You are the reason why we can continue our fight to put people first.

We're feeling strong and energized, but now we must face our next challenge. **We need to get Juli an on the November debate stage.** You've shown us that with Team Julian, anything is possible. So, please help us lift up Julian's voice so he can continue to be a champion for the issues that are too often ignored.

Thank you from Team Julian!

### [**DONATE**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d15/4006127555/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julianforthefuture?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d14/4006127555/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d13/4006127555/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d12/4006127555/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d11/4006127555/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal")**

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d10/4006127555/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc878/3eb3e2fc/5653472f/744d8d1f/4006127555/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191101_em_goal&source=20191101_em_goal"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Team Warren
subject: Add your name to support Medicare for All:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth became the first presidential candidate to lay out the true, full costs of any health care plan when she released a detailed plan to pay for Medicare for All... | | |
---
Today, we got one big step closer to Medicare for All.

Elizabeth became the first presidential candidate to lay out the true, full costs of any health care plan when she released a detailed plan to pay for Medicare for All.

Without raising taxes on the middle class, we can put $11 trillion back in the pockets of American families. **No premiums. No copays. No deductibles. No middle-class tax increase.**

Here's the thing, though: **Giant health insurance companies and drug companies won't back down without a fight.** They profit from the pain that the current health care system inflicts on working people, and they don't want anything to change.

But we're ready to take them on, and we're building the grassroots movement that will make Medicare for All a reality. We can only make the big, structural change we need if we fight side by side.

**[Add your name if you're in this fight all the way for Medicare for All.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528dd5/45c30650/1011a3ffd/66f54fa4/2447787685/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwxM1BfUkxUX0tJQ19UXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML13P_RLT_KIC_T_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

| [ **ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528dd5/45c30650/1011a3ffd/66f54fa4/2447787685/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwxM1BfUkxUX0tJQ19UXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML13P_RLT_KIC_T_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Fri, Nov 1, 2019
Subject: Medicare for All
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
We need a health care system that reflects our values.

No American should ever die or go bankrupt because of health care costs. And no for-profit insurance company should be able to stop any American from getting the care they need.

**Health care is a human right, and that 's why I'm fighting for Medicare for All.** It's the only plan that gives everyone in America full coverage, with the freedom to see any provider, with no premiums, copays, and deductibles -- no restrictions, no surprises, and no one going broke because they get sick.

**Today, I 'm releasing my plan to pay for Medicare for All. My plan won't raise middle-class taxes by one penny.** In fact, my plan puts $11 trillion back in the pockets of American families by virtually eliminating their current premiums, deductibles, and copays -- that's bigger than any tax cut in American history.

To cover the cost, we start by taking the money that employers are currently paying in the form of premiums to private insurance companies and have them pay it to Medicare instead.

We make up the difference with targeted spending cuts, new taxes on giant corporations, Wall Street, and the richest 1%, and cracking down on tax evasion and fraud.

**[See for yourself: Try our new calculator to see what our plan for Medicare for All would mean for you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528dd5/45c30650/1011a3ffd/66f54fa7/2447787685/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwxM1BfUkxUX0tJQ19UXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/calculator/medicare-for-all?source=EML13P_RLT_KIC_T_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Health care is personal for you, personal for me, and personal for every family in America.

My daddy's heart attack nearly sent our family skidding over a financial cliff.

Today, I think about all the kids this year who will face the double blow of nearly losing a parent and then watching their lives turn upside down as their families struggle to pay a growing stack of medical bills.

I spent my career studying why so many hard-working middle-class families were going broke. For years, my research partners and I traveled across the country, from bankruptcy courtroom to bankruptcy courtroom, talking directly with people who'd seen their lives turned upside down.

One of the biggest reasons we found? Medical problems. In 2007, my research found that the number one reason families were going broke was health care -- and three quarters of those who declared bankruptcy after an illness were people who already had health insurance.

Between 2013 and 2016, the number one reason families went broke was still because of health care -- even though 91.2% of Americans had health insurance in 2016.

**It 's clear: Families are getting crushed by health costs. But you know who's doing great? Private health insurance companies -- they're sucking billions of dollars in profits out of the system.**

Under Medicare for All, we'll rein in the corruption, waste, inefficiency, and corporate profiteering in our health care system.

And we can pay for it without any new taxes for middle-class families. Existing federal and state spending on health care stays about the same. Business spending on health care stays about the same -- payments just go to Medicare instead of private insurers. And yeah, big corporations, Wall Street, and the top 1% pay their fair share.

**Everyone 's covered, it's fully paid for, and independent economists have verified that it's doable. This is how we end the stranglehold of health care costs on American families and provide one of the greatest federal expansions of middle-class wealth in history.**

**[In just a few steps, use our calculator to find out how Medicare for All would affect you. And share what you see with your friends, your family -- with everyone you know.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528dd5/45c30650/1011a3ffd/66f54fa7/2447787685/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwxM1BfUkxUX0tJQ19UXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/calculator/medicare-for-all?source=EML13P_RLT_KIC_T_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Person to person, story by story, we'll fight the misinformation from giant health insurance and drug companies who are desperate to stop anything from getting in the way of their profits. We'll make it clear why we need to fight for Medicare for All -- because it will make a real difference in people's lives.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**TRY THE CALCULATOR**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528dd5/45c30650/1011a3ffd/66f54fa7/2447787685/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUwxM1BfUkxUX0tJQ19UXzIwMTkxMTAxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/calculator/medicare-for-all?source=EML13P_RLT_KIC_T_20191101_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528dd5/45c30650/1011a3ffd/66f54faf/2447787685/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Eric
subject: Peter, they are pulling out all the stops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
With just four days until Election Day, Matt Bevin's national backers are getting increasingly nervous -- and they are pulling out all the stops.
|
---

| | Peter,

With just four days until Election Day, Matt Bevin's national backers are getting increasingly nervous -- and they are pulling out all the stops.

Vice President Pence is here today to try to prop up Matt Bevin's flailing campaign. Bevin has the lowest job approval rating of any governor in the country. He can't run on his record so he has no choice but to call in last-minute help to try to bail himself out.

**Help us make sure it doesn 't work and rush a contribution today. ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557987/ad6dc73/17b886d6/db7033f/3754615881/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-deliver?express_lane=true&refcode=20191101.2nd__433__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557987/ad6dc73/17b886d6/db7033c/3754615881/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-deliver?express_lane=true&refcode=20191101.2nd__433__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557987/ad6dc73/17b886d6/db7033d/3754615881/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-deliver?express_lane=true&refcode=20191101.2nd__433__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557987/ad6dc73/17b886d6/db70332/3754615881/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-deliver?express_lane=true&refcode=20191101.2nd__433__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557987/ad6dc73/17b886d6/db70333/3754615881/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-deliver?express_lane=true&refcode=20191101.2nd__433__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557987/ad6dc73/17b886d6/db70330/3754615881/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-deliver?refcode=20191101.2nd__433__")** The political world is watching what happens in Kentucky. body:

The response was so overwhelming that we are extending our deadline for another 24 hours!
Yes, you heard that right. When we asked, you responded. You understand that Mike Turner has a history of standing up for the people of the Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio. Mike stands up for his constituents, he works to protect our jobs, and to combat Ohio's devastating opioid epidemic.
[_**Now I ask you, can you help?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Please consider donating $15, $35, $45, or Any Amount before our extended deadline runs out at midnight tonight!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks for your support in 2020!
Sincerely,

Rob
Team Turner

From: Mike Turner
Date: Thurs, Oct 31, 2019 at 4:00 PM
Subject: FWD: Tonight is the deadline!

[**Tonight is the deadline!** ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter,
I'm Mike Turner, and my team and I have been working hard over the last few days gathering support from patriots just like you.
[_**Tonight is the most important deadline of my reelection campaign to date!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) We must post a high dollar amount to show to Nancy Pelosi that this district is out of her reach.
[_**But we are running out of time!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) If we are unable to hit our October end of month fundraising goal by midnight, we will be behind at a crucial juncture of this campaign.
This is critical! Earlier today, Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff voted through a procedural step to start impeachment proceedings in the House!
The behind closed door nature of these impeachment proceedings thus far have been alarming. [_**We MUST reach our end of month goal to further push back against this closed door impeachment**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0) and force Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff to turn attention back to the important issues we need to be working on in Congress, helping all Americans get ahead.
My opponent is a Washington lobbyist who is backed by unlimited resources from special liberal interest groups who want her in office at all costs.
I need your help. For me to reach my goal this month, I need the help of patriots just like you!
[_**Can I count on you to help me in 2020?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I'm committed to fighting hard each and everyday for my constituents, to protect the jobs here, and to combat Ohio's opioid epidemic.
[_**Please donate $60, $45, $35, or any amount you can to help my team and I reach our end of month fundraising goal by tonight at midnight!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Rush in a donation now >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=NDEwMjMzMjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDA4NTIzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Some news, and a thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Our campaign has been about seeing clearly, speaking honestly and acting
decisively in the best interests of America.

Though it is difficult to accept, it is clear to me now that this campaign
does not have the means to move forward successfully. My service to the
country will not be as a candidate or as the nominee. Acknowledging this
now is in the best interests of those in the campaign; it is in the best
interests of this party as we seek to unify around a nominee; and it is in
the best interests of the country.

I decided to run for President because I believed that I could help bring
a divided country together in common cause to confront the greatest set of
challenges we’ve ever faced. I also knew that the most fundamental of them
is fear — the fear that Donald Trump wants us to feel about one another;
the very real fear that too many in this country live under; and the fear
we sometimes feel when it comes to doing the right thing, especially when
it runs counter to what is politically convenient or popular.

I knew, and I still know, that we can reject and overcome these fears and
choose to instead be defined by our ambitions and our ability to achieve
them.

I knew that we would have to be unafraid in how we ran the campaign. We’d
have to run with nothing to lose. And I knew that our success would depend
not on PACs or corporations but upon the grassroots volunteers and
supporters from everywhere, especially from those places that had been
overlooked or taken for granted.

We should be proud of what we fought for and what we were able to achieve.

Together we were able to help change what is possible when it comes to the
policies that we care about and the country we want to serve. We released
the first comprehensive plan to confront climate change of any of the
presidential candidates; we took the boldest approach to gun safety in
American history; we confronted institutional, systemic racism and called
out Donald Trump for his white supremacy and the violence that he’s
encouraged against communities that don’t look like, pray like or love
like the majority in this country; and we were one of the first to reject
all PAC money, corporate contributions, special interest donations and
lobbyist help.

We proposed an economic program that focused on both equality and equity
and would give every American the certainty that one job would be enough;
and a healthcare plan that would guarantee that every one of us is well
enough to live to our full potential.

We knew the only way our country would live up to its promise is if
everyone could stand up to be counted. We released the most ambitious
voter registration and voting rights plan, one that would bring 55 million
new voters into our democracy, and remove barriers for those who’ve been
silenced because of their race, ethnicity or the fact that they live with
a disability.

We spoke with pride about El Paso and communities of immigrants. We
elevated the plight and the promise of refugees and asylum seekers. And we
proposed nothing short of rewriting this country’s immigration laws in our
own image, to forever free from fear more than 11 million of our fellow
Americans who should be able to contribute even more to our shared
success.

And at this moment of truth for our country, we laid bare the cost and
consequence of Donald Trump: the rise in hate crimes, the terror attack in
El Paso, the perversion of the Constitution, the diminished standing of
the United States around the world. But we also made clear the common
responsibility to confront him, to hold him accountable and ensure that he
does not serve another term in office. Committing ourselves to this task
not as Democrats or Republicans, but as Americans first before we are
anything else.

I am grateful to each one of you, and to all the people who made up the
heart and soul of this campaign. You were among the hundreds of thousands
of our fellow Americans who made a donation, signed up to volunteer or
spread the word about this campaign and our opportunity to help decide the
election of our lifetime.

You have been with me from the beginning, through it all. I know that you
did it not for me personally, not for the Democratic Party, but for our
country at this defining moment. Though today we are suspending this
campaign, let us each continue our commitment to the country in whatever
capacity we can.

Let us continue to fearlessly champion the issues and causes that brought
us together. Whether it is ending the epidemic of gun violence or
dismantling structural racism or successfully confronting climate change
before it is too late, we will continue to organize and mobilize and act
in the best interests of America.

We will work to ensure that the Democratic nominee is successful in
defeating Donald Trump in 2020. I can tell you firsthand from having the
chance to know the candidates, we will be well served by any one of them,
and I’m going to be proud to support whoever that nominee is.

And proud to call them President in January 2021, because they will win.

We must support them in the race against Donald Trump and support them in
their administration afterwards, do all that we can to help them heal a
wounded country and bring us together in meeting the greatest set of
challenges we have ever known.

I’m confident I will see you down the road, and I look forward to that
day.

Thank you for making this campaign possible, and for continuing to believe
that we can turn this moment of great peril into a moment of great promise
for America and the world.

With you always, and forever grateful.

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191101footer&t=1001&refcode2=64983_444211_ZJU1fI&akid=64983%2E444211%2EZJU1fI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=64983%2E444211%2EZJU1fI

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
October Job Creation Comes in at 128,000, Easily Topping Estimates | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2096e4d376&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**October Job Creation Comes in at 128,000, Easily Topping Estimates**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8aea1598e9&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
American job growth has surpassed 100,000 jobs added in 32 of the 35 months since President Donald J. Trump was elected. October was no different, Jeff Cox reports. “Nonfarm payrolls rose by 128,000 in October as the U.S. economy overcame the weight of the GM autoworkers’ strike and created jobs at a pace well above expectations . . . The unemployment rate for African Americans nudged down to a record low 5.4%.”

**_MarketWatch:_** [S&P 500, Nasdaq hit new records on October jobs numbers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e641de7693&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**A Partisan Impeachment Vote**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ab7bae136&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The Pelosi impeachment resolution was supposed to deprive the GOP of its complaint that the process wasn’t formal,” Kimberley Strassel writes. Instead, the House vote “handed Republicans the gift of bipartisanship. In what was something of an embarrassment for the speaker, two Democrats, New Jersey’s Rep. Jeff Van Drew and Minnesota’s Rep. Collin Peterson, voted with Republicans against the impeachment resolution.”

**🎬** [While Democrats obstruct, President Trump continues to deliver results!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8806a7a1b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**A Tragedy for the Nation – and Democracy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7539079677&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“Impeachment is now one party against America,” Michael Goodwin writes. “After months of pushing back against impeachment, Pelosi has abandoned any pretense of being a leader. She has jumped on the bandwagon led by such kooks as Texas Rep. Al Green. He has been demanding impeachment since 2017 — on what grounds, he didn’t know and didn’t care.”
---
|
---
| [**Overdose Deaths Drop Sharply in States Hard Hit by Opioid Crisis**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25b9a8a414&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Bloomberg Law_
“The nation’s deadly opioid epidemic shows signs of ebbing as the Trump administration Oct. 30 reported a 5.1% drop in overdose deaths, with sharper declines in some of the most hard-hit states,” Shira Stein reports. The new figures reveal “a 24% reduction in Ohio, 17% in Kentucky, and 9% in West Virginia, White House Counselor Kellyanne Conway said.”

**_Associated Press_ : **[“White House Launches Website Aimed at Addiction Treatment”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=480e4ccaeb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Melania Trump, Karen Pence Visit Elementary School Students**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42bad015d2&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
First Lady Melania Trump and Second Lady Karen Pence “paid a visit Wednesday to a group of fifth-graders in South Carolina prepping emergency pillowcase kits for natural disasters as part of an initiative to mentally and physically prepare children for evacuations,” Vandana Rambaran reports. “‘I love what you are doing,’ Melania Trump told one girl.”

**Watch:** [The First and Second Ladies visit Joint Base Charleston](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d163842b4b&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Cory Booker
subject: New month, new priorities -- but same old me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| There's a lot on the horizon for our campaign, team:
1. The next DNC debate is **less than three weeks away** , and I'm already starting to prepare.
2. The Iowa caucuses are **only three months away** (with New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina soon after), and our teams on the ground are busy talking to voters and caucus-goers who are starting to make final decisions on whom to support.
3. We also **need to grow our campaign to 200,000 individual donors** to qualify for the December debate.

But first, I want to hear from you. **[Will you take our brand new Official Cory 2020 November Priorities Survey?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191101_CB_20191101-su-CB-priorities-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is the best way to have your input shared directly with me and this campaign. Your input will help us plan our strategy for the coming weeks. Thanks for sharing your thoughts,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20191101_CB_20191101-su-CB-priorities-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac7/5fca0d19/763cc9c8/291c0349/2932968970/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac7/5fca0d19/763cc9c8/291c0348/2932968970/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac7/5fca0d19/763cc9c8/291c0357/2932968970/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac7/5fca0d19/763cc9c8/291c0356/2932968970/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac7/5fca0d19/763cc9c8/291c0355/2932968970/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac7/5fca0d19/763cc9c8/291c0349/2932968970/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
